plugins.name: shopify-brain
plugins.description: Build a personalized AI brain for your Shopify store. Interactive onboarding captures your brand, customer, and strategy — then a daily assistant keeps it alive with check-ins, weekly reviews, experiment tracking, and decision logging.

plugins.name: shopify-blog-publisher
plugins.description: End-to-end Shopify blog article publisher. Keyword research (DataForSEO), blog writing, featured image generation (Kie AI), and publishing to Shopify — all in one flow.

plugins.name: ai-product-images
plugins.description: Generate AI product images (studio shots, UGC-style, model+product) and upload them directly to Shopify products. Powered by Kie AI.

plugins.name: dataforseo
plugins.description: DataForSEO MCP server — real-time access to keyword research, SERP data, backlinks, on-page analysis, and more.

plugins.name: kie-ai
plugins.description: Kie AI MCP server — AI image generation and editing with 20+ models (Nano Banana Pro, Seedream 5, Flux 2 Pro, Imagen 4, and more).
